About_&_Key_Points:
About
Procter & Gamble Hygiene and Health Care Limited is engaged in the manufacturing and selling of branded packaged fast moving consumer goods in the femcare and healthcare businesses. Its portfolio includes WHISPER – India’s leading Feminine Hygiene brand, and VICKS – India’s No. 1 Health Care brand and Old Spice.
Key Points
History
The company was incorporated in India as Richardson Hindustan Limited in 1964 and was acquired by Procter & Gamble (P&G) in 1985. It is engaged in the manufacturing and sale of branded packaged Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) in the female hygiene and healthcare sectors. P&G is a global leader in the FMCG industry, with its products available in approximately 180 countries and territories.
